dict.string: Pip uses your microphone so you can talk to your local AI pet agent.
Pip needs screen recording access so its local agent can inspect your screen and point at useful UI.
Pip uses Apple Speech to transcribe your voice locally when you talk to it.
Pip needs reminders access to create reminders you ask for.
Pip needs calendar access to create events you ask for.
Pip needs automation access to create Notes entries and control Apple apps for your tasks.
Pip needs input monitoring access so it can hear the push-to-talk shortcut and drive keyboard actions you request.
